get_merge_request.title: Add retry with backoff to the webhook dispatcher
get_merge_request.description:
## What & why

The webhook dispatcher dropped events when the downstream returned 5xx. This adds an
exponential-backoff retry (3 attempts) so transient downstream failures no longer lose events.

Jira: https://acme.atlassian.net/browse/API-921

## How to test

1. `npm install`
2. Point `WEBHOOK_URL` at a server that returns 503 twice then 200.
3. Enqueue an event and confirm it is delivered after the retries.

## Proof it was run

All tests pass:

```
PASS  src/webhooks/dispatcher.test.ts (8 tests)
  ✓ retries on 5xx with backoff
  ✓ gives up after 3 attempts
Test Suites: 1 passed, Tests: 8 passed
```

## Notes for reviewer

Start in `src/webhooks/dispatcher.ts`. No breaking changes.
get_merge_request.commit_summary: 2 commits: add backoff retry, add dispatcher tests
